name: qr-code
description: Encodes a URL or short text into a scannable SVG QR code

meta.name: QrCode
meta.description: Encodes a URL or short text into a scannable SVG QR code

props.name: errorCorrection
props.description: Higher levels tolerate more damage but hold less data

props.name: fill
props.description: Foreground color of the QR modules.

props.name: background
props.description: Background color behind the QR code.

whenToUse: Letting users scan a URL, contact, or short token with a phone camera
Bridging print or screen to a digital destination
Sharing a link where typing it would be error-prone
whenNotToUse: Encoding long or sensitive payloads — QR codes are public and capacity-limited
Where a plain, copyable link or button is more accessible

antiPatterns.why: Long payloads force a dense, hard-to-scan code; encode a short URL that redirects instead

related.name: CopyButton
related.reason: Offer a copyable link alongside the QR code for non-camera contexts

intent.a11yRationale: Rendered as role="img" with an accessible label so screen-reader users know a QR code is present; the underlying link should also be available as text since a QR code is not operable by assistive tech

flexibility.note: Raise to Q/H when the code may be printed small or partially obscured
Defaults to currentColor; keep sufficient contrast between fill and background to stay scannable
